labels.note: OutputSystem combines multiple responsibilities: writing updated taxpayer files, generating TXT/XML reports, constructing pie charts, and constructing bar charts.
labels.refactoringNote: Split the class into separate responsibilities for updated-file output, report generation, and chart generation, as required by the backlog.

labels.note: The TXT and XML output methods repeat the same taxpayer and receipt traversal logic while differing mainly in labels, opening tags, and closing tags.
labels.refactoringNote: Extract a shared report-writing workflow and parameterize the format-specific labels or tags used by TXT and XML output.
